summary: Metallurgical & Materials Engineering student (VNIT Nagpur, graduating 2026) with hands-on experience across investment casting, additive manufacturing, mechanical testing, SEM-based fractography, and digital image correlation. GATE 2026 AIR 281 (Metallurgical Engineering). Looking for roles in materials R&D, failure analysis, semiconductor materials, or advanced manufacturing.

education.institution: Visvesvaraya National Institute of Technology (VNIT), Nagpur
education.details: CGPA: 7.22. Key courses: Mechanical Behaviour of Materials, Physical Metallurgy, Materials Characterization, Semiconductors, Failure Analysis, Process Optimization.

education.institution: Somalwar High School and Junior College, Nikalas Branch, Nagpur
education.details: 95.4%. Recognized as "Star of Nikalas" on passing out.

bullets: Developed a controlled process for synthesizing uniform polyurethane microspheres through polymerization techniques.
Integrated synthesized polyurethane microspheres into an epoxy resin matrix to enhance its mechanical properties.
Fabricated syntactic foam by optimizing microsphere concentration and evaluating structural performance.
